cashier.reverseDesc: This unmarks the latest paid round. The session re-opens and the bill will appear under

dashboard.books.snapshotDesc: Auto-closes nightly at 5am. Use this only to close earlier or amend.
dashboard.books.revenueGroupedNote: Revenue is grouped by when the cashier accepted payment, not when the order was placed.
dashboard.books.lateNightNote: Orders placed before midnight but paid after midnight land on the next day's books. To keep a late-night bill on yesterday's day, take payment before 12:00 AM. Otherwise close both days: close yesterday first, then today.
dashboard.books.downloadDesc: Download a spreadsheet for your accountant
dashboard.books.confirmClose: Close the books for {date}? This locks that day's totals.
dashboard.clock.title: Clock Log
dashboard.clock.subtitle: Actual hours worked (vs. scheduled)
dashboard.confirm.clearTable: Clear Table {id}? This will close the session and mark the table idle.
dashboard.confirm.resetAll: Reset everything? This will delete ALL orders, sessions, ratings, settlements, and messages. All tables will return to idle. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.dangerZone.description: Reset all tables to idle. Deletes all orders, sessions, ratings, settlements, and messages.

dashboard.goLive.title: Go Live
dashboard.goLive.description: Wipe all test data and start fresh for production. Keeps your menu, tables, staff, and settings intact.
dashboard.goLive.item.shifts: All shift clock-in/out records and cash drawers
dashboard.goLive.item.dailyCloses: All daily close reports and VIP records
dashboard.goLive.finalWarning: Are you absolutely sure? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.goLive.successDetail: All test data has been wiped. Your restaurant is ready for production.
